name: OKRs (Objectives and Key Results)
what_it_is: Separating ambitious directional objectives from measurable time-bound key results indicating progress toward them.
core_mechanic: One Objective (qualitative, inspiring, directional). 3-5 Key Results (quantitative, time-bound, outcomes not activities). 70% attainment = success - 100% means the goal wasn't ambitious enough.
when_to_use: Translating strategic direction into execution targets / Aligning a team around shared success criteria / Clarity on destination but not how to measure progress
when_not_to_use: Operational tasks that are just work / Very short time horizons (under 4 weeks) / Goal is still being defined
ideaos_application: Agent 3 drafts one Objective and 3 Key Results. Checks that Key Results are outcomes not activities, measurable, and would genuinely indicate the Objective was achieved.
